name: Walk Cycle
description: Natural walking forward motion, steady pace with arm swing

name: Turn Reveal
description: Character turns from profile to face camera, dramatic reveal

name: Wave Greeting
description: Friendly overhead wave, arm raised and hand sweeping

name: Surprise Reaction
description: Startled backward step, hands raised in shock

name: Punch Combo
description: Fighting stance to extended punch, returning to guard

name: Emotional Despair
description: Character slumps into despair, head bowing, shoulders dropping

name: Hero Reveal
description: Dramatic silhouette to triumphant arms-raised victory pose

name: Sprint Burst
description: Explosive sprint start, full running stride at speed

name: Dance Step
description: Simple rhythmic dance move with hip sway and arm swing

name: Desk Work
description: Seated typing posture shifting to leaning forward in concentration

name: Sitting Idle
description: Relaxed seated pose shifting weight between casual positions

name: Standing Idle
description: Relaxed weight shift from neutral to contrapposto stance

name: Stand to Sit
description: Character lowers from standing through crouching into seated position

name: Crowd Cheer
description: Enthusiastic cheer with arms pumping up, celebration gesture

name: Reach Upward
description: Character stretches and reaches up toward something overhead

name: Driving Pose
description: Seated at wheel, slight forward lean, hands shifting position

name: Combat Defense
description: Guard position dropping into defensive crouch, protecting head

name: Chase Sprint
description: Desperate full-body sprint with forward lean, arms driving

name: Falling Stumble
description: Character loses balance and falls forward, arms reaching out

name: Romance Reach
description: Tender reaching gesture toward someone, open embracing stance
